title: Bouncy Filipino Rice Bowl
description: A flavorful and aromatic Filipino dish made with bouncy rice and topped with savory ingredients. This recipe is a great way to experience the bold flavors of the Philippines.

ingredients.name: Bowl-Filling Vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as bell peppers, carrots, and snap peas

instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add the cubed tofu and cook until golden brown.
Push the tofu to one side of the pan.
Crack an egg into the empty side of the pan and cook until the whites are set.
Flip the egg and cook for another 30 seconds.
Repeat step 4 to make another egg.
Add the chopped rocket greens to the pan and cook until wilted.
Add the bowl-filling vegetables to the pan and cook until tender.
To assemble the dish, place a scoop of bouncy rice on the bottom of a bowl.
Add the cooked tofu, eggs, and vegetables on top of the rice.
